title: Clean up turbo_packages monorepo after package extraction
description: Remove all workspace references, melos filter entries, and orphaned root dependencies related to turbo_widgets, turbo_template, and turbo_plx_cli from the turbo_packages monorepo. Update CLAUDE.md to reflect the reduced package set. The actual package directories are NOT deleted — the user will remove them manually after verifying the new repos work. This task ensures the monorepo builds and analyzes cleanly without the extracted packages.
context: The turbo_packages monorepo's root pubspec.yaml has a 'workspace:' list that includes turbo_plx_cli, turbo_template/flutter-app, turbo_widgets, and turbo_widgets/example. These entries must be removed. The melos configuration in the same pubspec.yaml has packageFilters that ignore 'turbo_flutter_template' in pub-check, pub-publish, and pub-publish-dry-run scripts — these filter entries must be removed. The root pubspec.yaml also has three dependencies that are ONLY used by the extracted packages: cached_network_image (^3.4.1), flutter_hooks (^0.21.3+1), and soft_edge_blur (^0.1.3). These must be removed. The json_annotation dependency_override STAYS because turbo_promptable and turbo_serializable still use it. CLAUDE.md contains a project overview mentioning '11 published packages and 1 production Flutter template app' and a dependency hierarchy listing turbo_widgets, turbo_plx_cli, and turbo_template — these must be updated.

before_starting: Update this task's status to 'in-progress' immediately after reading it to prevent other agents from picking it up.
Read the spec file at workspace/specs/monorepo-extraction/package-extraction/extraction-spec.json for full context.

Verify that tasks 1, 2, and 3 (the three extraction tasks) are marked as 'done' in workspace/tasks/archive/dev/. If any are still in progress or todo, STOP and wait — this task depends on all three extractions being complete.
goals: Root pubspec.yaml workspace list no longer references turbo_plx_cli, turbo_template/flutter-app, turbo_widgets, or turbo_widgets/example
Melos script packageFilters no longer reference turbo_flutter_template
Root dependencies section no longer includes cached_network_image, flutter_hooks, or soft_edge_blur
CLAUDE.md project overview and dependency hierarchy are updated to reflect the reduced package set
make analyze passes on the monorepo
non_goals: Do not delete the turbo_widgets/, turbo_template/, or turbo_plx_cli/ directories — they stay until the user manually removes them
Do not modify any other package's pubspec.yaml or source code
Do not touch the openspec/ directory or any archived change documents
Do not modify any Makefile or tool/ scripts unless they specifically reference the removed packages
steps_overview: Read the root pubspec.yaml thoroughly to understand the current state
Remove these entries from the workspace list: turbo_plx_cli, turbo_template/flutter-app, turbo_widgets, turbo_widgets/example
In the melos scripts section, find all packageFilters.ignore lists that contain 'turbo_flutter_template' and remove that entry from each list (pub-check, pub-publish, pub-publish-dry-run)
Remove from the dependencies section: cached_network_image, flutter_hooks, soft_edge_blur
KEEP the dependency_overrides section with json_annotation (^4.11.0) — it is still needed

Read CLAUDE.md and update: change '11 published packages and 1 production Flutter template app' to reflect the new count (8 published packages remaining: turbo_response, turbo_serializable, turbo_notifiers, turbolytics, turbo_mvvm, turbo_firestore_api, turbo_forms, turbo_promptable). Remove turbo_widgets, turbo_plx_cli, and turbo_template from the dependency hierarchy section.
Run 'dart pub get' at root to verify resolution
Run 'make analyze' to verify the monorepo analyzes cleanly
Commit with message 'chore: remove extracted packages from workspace (turbo_widgets, turbo_template, turbo_plx_cli)' and push
acceptance_criteria: Root pubspec.yaml workspace list has exactly these entries: turbo_firestore_api, turbo_firestore_api/example, turbo_forms, turbo_mvvm, turbo_mvvm/example, turbo_notifiers, turbo_notifiers/example, turbo_promptable, turbo_response, turbo_response/example, turbo_serializable, turbolytics, turbolytics/example
Root dependencies section does not contain cached_network_image, flutter_hooks, or soft_edge_blur
Root dependency_overrides section still contains json_annotation
CLAUDE.md project overview reflects 8 published packages, no template app
CLAUDE.md dependency hierarchy does not list turbo_widgets, turbo_plx_cli, or turbo_template
dart pub get at root succeeds
make analyze passes with zero issues
Changes are committed and pushed to main
constraints: Do not delete any directories — only modify configuration files and documentation
Do not change any version numbers or dependency constraints on remaining packages
Do not modify any package-level pubspec.yaml files — only the root pubspec.yaml
Preserve the exact formatting style of pubspec.yaml (indentation, spacing)

expected_outcomes: dart pub get and make analyze exit with code 0
grep for extracted package names in pubspec.yaml returns 0 matches
grep for removed dependencies returns 0 matches

after_completion: Update this task's status to 'done' and add a worklog entry describing what was done.
Move this task file to workspace/tasks/archive/dev/ using 'mv'.
Check if any remaining open tasks exist. If all tasks are archived, the extraction is complete.
